capabilities: Integrate inductive reasoning with software architecture knowledge bases by identifying and merging shared procedural steps to enhance analytical capabilities.

procedure.action: Reconcile artifacts from inductive reasoning and software architecture knowledge bases using domain-specific tools; ensure error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Assert the merged output by applying JSON Schema draft-07 validation; emit VALIDATION_FAILED with field path on the first failing field; ensure error_count < 1 and result_valid = true.
Filter candidate insights by executing domain-specific algorithms; ensure error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Assign results using machine learning models trained on domain-specific datasets; ensure error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Log all operations with timestamps and unique identifiers to an audit trail for traceability and compliance with data governance policies using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

summary: Combine insights from inductive reasoning and software architecture knowledge bases by merging workflows and aligning shared steps for cohesive analysis.
title: Inductive Reasoning Knowledge Base Composition

failureConditions: Inconsistent data when merge omits NULL handling: records with NULL key fields are silently dropped, causing referential integrity violations in downstream consumers.
Analysis errors occur when validation steps are skipped, causing incorrect insights to propagate through the knowledge base.
Operational logs become unreliable when timestamps or unique identifiers are missing, causing traceability issues in audit trails.
metrics: the merged output by applying JSON Schema draft-07 validation
